title: justicia calliantha
intro: Justicia calliantha, also known as the Justicia plant or Butter Cup Mint, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Justicia calliantha include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
